hero.title: My Journey to South Korea
hero.subtitle: Discovering Busan, Seoul, Korean Cuisine, and an Unforgettable Study Exchange

stages.title: Busan: The Coastal Gem
stages.desc: Our first destination welcomed us with bustling beaches, colorful markets, and stunning coastal views. Busan's vibrant energy and blend of tradition and modernity captured our hearts from day one.

stages.title: Korean Cuisine: A Culinary Adventure
stages.desc: From street food to fine dining, every meal was an exploration. Kimchi, bibimbap, and tteokbokki became more than just food—they were gateways to understanding Korean culture.

stages.title: The Study Project & BISF Festival
stages.desc: Our exchange program brought us together with local students. The BISF Festival was the highlight—showcasing innovation, creativity, and international collaboration in ways we never expected.

stages.title: Seoul: The Dynamic Capital
stages.desc: K-pop districts, ancient temples, modern skyscrapers—Seoul embodied contradictions beautifully. Every neighborhood told a different story of Korea's past and future.

cards.title: Busan's Maritime Magic
cards.desc: A walk along Haeundae Beach at golden hour, with waves crashing and the city lights beginning to twinkle.

cards.title: A Taste of Korea
cards.desc: From making bibimbap to sampling street food at night markets. Every bite tells a story.

cards.title: Seoul After Dark
cards.desc: Neon lights, bustling streets, and unforgettable nights exploring Gangnam, Itaewon, and beyond.

items.title: Busan's Hidden Neighborhoods
items.desc: Beyond the tourist trails, we discovered quaint cafes, vintage shops, and locals-only restaurants that became our favorite retreats.

items.title: Temple Visits & Spiritual Moments
items.desc: Quiet mornings at ancient temples, meditating alongside monks and finding peace in Korea's spiritual heritage.

items.title: Language & Cultural Exchanges
items.desc: Learning Korean phrases, sharing our cultures, and building friendships that transcended language barriers.

items.title: BISF Festival Connections
items.desc: Collaborating with international students, presenting our project, and realizing the power of global collaboration.

parallax.title: What Korea Taught Us
parallax.text: Travel isn't just about checking destinations off a list. It's about stepping out of your comfort zone, embracing the unfamiliar, and discovering that connection transcends borders. Korea did more than show us beautiful places—it changed our perspective on education, friendship, and what it means to be a global citizen.

photos.caption: Coffee break in a cozy café

footer.title: Ready to Explore the World?
